samples.xml_description:
<module id="right_shifter">
    <description>Implement a right shifter.</description>
    <ports>
        <input id="clk">Clock.</input>
        <input id="d">Input signal to be right-shifted.</input>
        <output id="q" width_description="[7:0]">Output signal representing the result of the right shift operation.</output>
    </ports>
    <parameter_description>
        <param id="width" value="8"/>
    </parameter_description>
    <logic_description>
        <sequential_logic>
            <reg id="q" type="state" width_description="[7:0]">Register to store the right-shifted result.</reg>
            <always>
                <clock_edge_event>
                    <if>
                        <equals>
                            <component id="clk"/>
                            <const>1</const>
                        </equals>
                    </if>
                    <then>
                        <non_blocking>
                            <component id="q"/> <= <shift_right><component id="q"/>; <component id="d"/></shift_right>;
                        </non_blocking>
                    </then>
                </clock_edge_event>
            </always>
        </sequential_logic>
    </logic_description>
    <task>
        <inherited>
            <description>Initialize the state of the module.</description>
            <sequential>
                <non_blocking>
                    <component id="q"/> <= <const>0</const>;
                </non_blocking>
            </sequential>
        </inherited>
    </task>
</module>
